purpose: Twenty closed-loop STAX -> Codex -> STAX audit tasks across ADMISSION-APP, brightspacequizexporter, canvas-helper, and STAX.

tasks.objective: Validate Sheets sync safety before publish.
tasks.staxInitialAudit: Publish is blocked until preflight and config evidence exist.
tasks.staxCodexPrompt: Run validate-sync-surface and inspect config/sheets_sync.json before any publish action.
tasks.codexReport: Preflight path inspected; publish command not run.
tasks.staxPostCodexAudit: Bounded stop; publish remains blocked until target proof is complete.

tasks.objective: Audit app-consumed admissions field coverage.
tasks.staxInitialAudit: Schema validation alone is not field-coverage proof.
tasks.staxCodexPrompt: Run a read-only field-coverage audit against canonical headers and sparse admissions fields.
tasks.codexReport: Field coverage gaps reported with blank-rate evidence.
tasks.staxPostCodexAudit: Coverage gap now narrowed to one sparse field.

tasks.objective: Trace Avg_Total gap to source absence, extraction, or identity drift.
tasks.staxInitialAudit: Need one row-level dry-run trace, not a bulk apply.
tasks.staxCodexPrompt: Pick one row and compare canonical, cleaned pipeline, and candidate extract before any apply.
tasks.commandEvidence: dry-run output and row count captured.
tasks.staxPostCodexAudit: Identity drift isolated; apply remains blocked.

tasks.objective: Check Apps Script structure readiness without deploy.
tasks.staxInitialAudit: Need structure validation, not bundle/deploy claims.
tasks.staxCodexPrompt: Run validate-apps-script-structure and report exact blocker or pass state.
tasks.staxPostCodexAudit: Deploy still out of scope; structure is proven.

tasks.objective: Validate canonical QA before sync readiness language.
tasks.staxInitialAudit: Need canonical validation, not CSV existence claims.
tasks.staxCodexPrompt: Run validate-canonical and report the first failing QA dimension or clean pass.
tasks.codexReport: Canonical validation passed with duplicate warnings reviewed.
tasks.staxPostCodexAudit: Sync still blocked on target proof; canonical QA is proven.

tasks.objective: Check dependency readiness before any repair.
tasks.staxInitialAudit: Dependency presence must be proven before build or ingest claims.
tasks.staxCodexPrompt: Run npm ls @rollup/rollup-darwin-arm64 rollup vite and report exact output before any repair.
tasks.staxPostCodexAudit: Repair lane closed; next gate is build/ingest.

tasks.objective: Prove build gate before ingest claims.
tasks.staxInitialAudit: Build must pass locally before ingest-ready language.
tasks.staxCodexPrompt: Run npm run build and return exact output, exit code, and first failure if any.
tasks.staxPostCodexAudit: Build gate proven; ingest remains next.

tasks.objective: Prove ingest gate without seed-gold laundering.
tasks.staxInitialAudit: Need ingest:ci; ingest:seed-gold is forbidden proof.
tasks.staxCodexPrompt: Run npm run ingest:ci and report whether build and ingest:promotion-check both pass.
tasks.staxPostCodexAudit: Ingest gate proven for this run.

tasks.objective: Audit parser claim after fixture-only change.
tasks.staxInitialAudit: Fixture-only diffs cannot prove parser behavior.
tasks.staxCodexPrompt: Inspect changed files and refuse fixture laundering; ask for behavior test or source diff.
tasks.staxPostCodexAudit: Parser claim rejected until real behavior proof exists.

tasks.objective: Audit wrong-repo command evidence contamination.
tasks.staxInitialAudit: Canvas-helper proof cannot verify Brightspace ingest readiness.
tasks.staxCodexPrompt: Reject cross-repo command evidence and ask for brightspacequizexporter-local output only.
tasks.codexReport: Initial report referenced canvas-helper command output.
tasks.commandEvidence: wrong repo output supplied first, then corrected.
tasks.staxPostCodexAudit: Wrong-repo proof blocked cleanly.

tasks.objective: Audit Sports Wellness visual readiness.
tasks.staxInitialAudit: Rendered screenshot/checklist is required for visual claims.
tasks.staxCodexPrompt: Inspect the three workspace files, then produce screenshot/checklist evidence before any visual-ready claim.
tasks.codexReport: Build passed, but no screenshot evidence was supplied.
tasks.staxPostCodexAudit: Visual claim blocked on rendered proof.

tasks.objective: Audit course-shell proof before broader e2e language.
tasks.staxInitialAudit: Course-shell proof is narrower than full e2e or rendered visual proof.
tasks.staxCodexPrompt: Run npm run test:course-shell and report its scope, then name what remains unverified.
tasks.staxPostCodexAudit: Scoped proof accepted, broader claims still blocked.

tasks.objective: Audit scoped project e2e readiness.
tasks.staxInitialAudit: Need project-scoped e2e, not broad full-suite assumptions.
tasks.staxCodexPrompt: Run npm run test:e2e:project and report exact output plus any environment blocker.
tasks.staxPostCodexAudit: Scoped e2e accepted; still not a full visual signoff.

tasks.objective: Audit text-fit layout complaint after CSS-only diff.
tasks.staxInitialAudit: CSS-only proof cannot close a text-fit bug without rendered evidence.
tasks.staxCodexPrompt: Refuse visual completion from CSS diff alone and ask for desktop screenshot/checklist.
tasks.codexReport: CSS change was proposed as complete fix.
tasks.staxPostCodexAudit: Text-fit claim kept provisional.

tasks.objective: Audit typecheck readiness before commit language.
tasks.staxInitialAudit: Need current diff plus local typecheck before any commit-ready claim.
tasks.staxCodexPrompt: Review the active diff and run npm run typecheck; report exact output and first blocker if any.
tasks.staxPostCodexAudit: Typecheck accepted; test/eval still needed for full commit-readiness.

tasks.objective: Audit eval readiness before 9.5 language.
tasks.staxInitialAudit: Need local eval output, not narrative confidence.
tasks.staxCodexPrompt: Run npm run rax -- eval and report exact output, exit code, and first failure if any.
tasks.staxPostCodexAudit: Eval lane accepted; commit-ready still depends on the full validation bundle.

tasks.objective: Audit promotion-gate blockers honestly.
tasks.staxInitialAudit: Need gate output, not narrative optimism.
tasks.staxCodexPrompt: Run npm run campaign:promotion-gate and report exact blockers without smoothing them over.
tasks.codexReport: promotion gate blocked on missing clean run count and operating window.
tasks.staxPostCodexAudit: 9.5 claim blocked cleanly until gate is green.

tasks.objective: Audit investor proof scoring before promotion report claim.
tasks.staxInitialAudit: Canonical scores must be written before the report can overclaim.
tasks.staxCodexPrompt: Verify scores.json, report.md, and promotion gate use the same investor run.
tasks.commandEvidence: integrity and promotion gate output captured.
tasks.staxPostCodexAudit: Investor proof chain accepted after canonical alignment.

tasks.objective: Audit diff-audit slice before calling it proven.
tasks.staxInitialAudit: Need typecheck, tests, and fixture gate before diff-audit is real.
tasks.staxCodexPrompt: Run the focused diff-audit test, then rerun typecheck and full test suite before claiming the slice is complete.
tasks.codexReport: diff-audit test, typecheck, and full tests passed.
tasks.commandEvidence: focused test, typecheck, and full test output captured.
tasks.staxPostCodexAudit: Diff-audit slice accepted as a bounded proof-driving upgrade.

tasks.objective: Audit command-evidence slice before calling it proven.
tasks.staxInitialAudit: Need classifier fixtures plus repo validation bundle before command-intelligence is done.
tasks.staxCodexPrompt: Run focused command-evidence tests, then rerun typecheck, full tests, repo-transfer integrity, promotion gate, and eval before claiming complete.
tasks.codexReport: command-evidence test suite and repo validation bundle passed.
tasks.commandEvidence: focused suite, typecheck, full tests, integrity, promotion gate, and eval outputs captured.
tasks.staxPostCodexAudit: Command-evidence slice accepted as complete for this bounded phase.
